title: apparmor: don't load default profile in rootless mode
body:
AppArmor requires root privileges, so skip loading the default profile
in rootless mode.  Also add a log to ease debugging.

Fixes: #2223
Reported-by: @dmacvicar
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@rhatdan PTAL. @cevich and I are checking to make CI catch that.
https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2225 uses this PR and enables AppArmor in the CI. Let's merge https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2225 in favor of this (assuming tests will pass).
